title: fraxinus americana var. sambucifolia
intro: Fraxinus americana var. sambucifolia, also known as the American green ash, is a deciduous tree or shrub that belongs to the olive family (Oleaceae). The medicinal properties of this plant include its rich content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Fraxinus americana var. sambucifolia include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to calm the nervous system, promote digestive health, and support the immune system.
